name: NEET simulator
short_description: Operate a NEET and observe his daily life. Playing computer games and watching cartoon,buy garage kits and work online. Don't let your NEET die.
detailed_description:
NEET simulator is a simulator game. Operate a NEET and observe his daily life.

Playing computer games and watching cartoon.

Buy garage kits and complete them.

Work online if you can't afford a new game.

Don't let your NEET die.

· 1 Fat NEET

· 75 games

· 40 animations and cartoons

· 50 garage kits

(press up down left right B and A to cheat)

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Danish, Ukrainian, Russian, Bulgarian, Hungarian, Turkish, Greek, Norwegian, Czech, Japanese, Polish, Thai, Swedish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Romanian, Finnish, Dutch, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Arabic, Korean
